channel.title: UFO Phenomenon on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in UFO Phenomenon on Alien Truth Social

item.title: National UFO Conference
item.description:
The National UFO Conference (NUFOC) was an annual conference based in San Diego, California, with a mission to present research in ufology. It began in 1964 as the Congress of Scientific Ufologists and was the longest active conference in the United States for presenting information on the UFO phenomenon. In 2004, James W. Moseley retired as Permanent Chairman, and Lisa Davis took over as Executive Director, aiming to increase public awareness of UFO phenomena by expanding contacts within the entertainment community. Davis, active in ufology since 1997, also founded The Foundation For Abductee Research and Support.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/National_UFO_Conference

item.title: UFO: The True Story of Flying Saucers
item.description:
UFO (full title: Unidentified Flying Objects: The True Story of Flying Saucers) is a 1956 American semi-documentary film exploring the UFO phenomenon in the United States. The film begins by recounting early publicized UFO sightings and the US Air Force’s initial investigations, including Project Sign. It then follows Albert M. Chop, a public information officer, as his views on UFOs evolve from skepticism to belief in their unknown, possibly extraterrestrial, origin. The documentary analyzes notable UFO footage and culminates with a recreation of the 1952 Washington, D.C. UFO incident, in which Chop played a significant role.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_%281956_film%29
